mapper.select: SELECT * FROM points_product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM points_product ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_product (name, image, description, points_required, stock, status, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{image}, #{description}, #{pointsRequired}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE points_product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
